v1.0.0 - CANZIM FinTrack Financial Management System

Complete ERP system for Climate Action Network Zimbabwe featuring:

Modules:

- Financial Dashboard with role-based views & Chart.js analytics
- Project & Budget Management with multi-project allocation
- Expense Tracking & Multi-step Approval Workflow
- Cash Flow Management with bank account integration
- Purchase Order Processing with partial/full receiving
- Donor & Funding Management with multi-donor reporting
- Document Management with version control
- Financial Reports with PDF export (DomPDF)
- System Settings, Audit Trail & Activity Logging
- User Management with role-based access control (3 roles)

Technical:

- Laravel 12 + Vue 3 (Composition API) + Pinia + TailwindCSS v4
- Laravel Sanctum API authentication with 5-min session timeout
- 686 tests, 2957 assertions (100% pass rate)
- RESTful API architecture with Eloquent Resources
